blockers.description: v0.1.0 tag points to old commit before cargo-dist allow-dirty and vendored-openssl fixes

blockers.description: CI still needs to pass after retag

human_actions_pending.action: Retag v0.1.0 at current HEAD and push to trigger release
human_actions_pending.context: Two CI fixes were committed after the tag was pushed: allow-dirty=[ci] and vendored-openssl. The tag must be moved to HEAD.

decisions.rationale: Prevents cargo-dist from rejecting release.yml modified with manual macOS codesign step
openssl-sys can't locate OpenSSL on musl cross-compile targets; vendoring compiles it from source for fully static binaries
Keeps release.yml focused on releases; ci.yml runs on all PRs and main pushes
Consistent release UX across projects; handles version bump, test/clippy gates, tag creation and push

next_action: User retags v0.1.0 at HEAD and pushes. Monitor CI at https://github.com/themouette/claude-plan-reviewer/actions. Once 4 platform archives appear on GitHub Releases, create 03-03-SUMMARY.md and run phase verification.
context_notes: Phase 03 plan 03-03 (gap closure) is nearly done. Task 1 (OWNER fix) committed. Task 2 blocked on human tag push. All CI infrastructure (clippy, fmt, eslint, GH Actions versions) cleaned up in this session. Source is in good shape — fmt/clippy/eslint all pass.
